title: Durability 101
description: Adds an overlay above an item's hotbar showing its durability in a numeric value
body:
This mod is inspired by the original [Durability101 mod by  RedBanHammer](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1285383-1-6-2-jul-13-durability101-hotbar-visible-use)

Adds an overlay above an item's hotbar showing its durability in a numeric value. The number gets colored from the scale of green to red in accordance to the used durability on the given item.

![Items in inventory with durability numbers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d41b2a5650179fde0853739e2b24f2863a5ba1.png)
